title: Glitch Tech Fest 2026 blends innovation, AI insights and high-energy E-Sports at Shoolini University Solan,
description: March 20, Shoolini University organised Glitch Tech Fest 2026, a vibrant convergence of technology, innovation, and competitive gaming. The three-day event, held as part of the university’s Spring Fest, brought together industry experts, academicians, and students for an engaging celebration of digital creativity and emerging technologies. title: Elon Musk’s Terafab: A $10 Billion Bet That America Can Build Its Own AI Chip Empire
description: Elon Musk's xAI plans to build Terafab, what he claims will be the world's largest chip fabrication facility. The $10 billion project raises enormous questions about financing, workforce, water, power, and whether any AI company can master semiconductor manufacturing from scratch.

title: Prediction: This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Will Be Worth $5 Trillion by the End of 2026
description: Artificial intelligence is driving growth across all the business segments of this tech giant.

title: Microsoft Wants to Replace You With an AI Employee Named ‘Friday’ — And It’s Not Kidding
description: Microsoft is rebranding Copilot as "Friday," an autonomous AI coworker that can act without prompts, maintain memory across sessions, and execute workflows independently — raising urgent questions about enterprise governance, labor displacement, and competitive strategy in the AI agent market.

title: Survey: 90% Of Advisors Say AI Will Redefine – Not Replace – Their Role
description: Advisors embrace AI for efficiency, but not decision-making. Surveys show clients expect more personalized advice while AI handles tasks, yet tech limitations hinder its potential. Importance Rank: 1 read more
